items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 再次确认美国政府出口管制指令要求立即暂停 Claude Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 的全部访问。本条相较此前声明未新增技术细节，但要求所有接入该模型的系统立即断开。
items.backend_focus: 立即行动：检查代码中所有引用 Fable 5 / Mythos 5（model 字段、fallback 路由、AB 测试配置）的位置，下线或切换至 Sonnet 5 / Opus 4.8；同步清理 prompt 缓存和向量库中的模型元数据。

items.title: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude.
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Sonnet 5 Sonnet 5 delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale. Announcements  Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now available Claude Science is a customizable app that integrates the tools and packages researchers most often use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources. Product   Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking proce...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 推出 Claude Tag，是一种新的团队协作使用 Claude 的方式。属于产品形态变化，摘要未透露具体 API 字段差异。
items.backend_focus: 关注后续 Anthropic 是否在 API 端开放 tag/分组计费或配额隔离字段；目前无 SDK 必改项，暂不行动。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Sonnet 5 Sonnet 5 delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale. Announcements  Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now available Claude Science is a customizable app that integrates the tools and packages researchers most often use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources. Product  Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.8，是 Opus 系列升级版本，coding、agent 任务与专业工作能力更强。相较 Opus 4.5 是同系列小幅迭代，工具调用与上下文能力需以官方 model card 为准。
items.backend_focus: 将高复杂度任务路由从 Opus 4.5 切换到 claude-opus-4-8，对比 tool use 成功率与 max_tokens 实际配额；旧 Opus 4.5 关注 deprecation 公告。

items.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 在首尔开设办公室并宣布与韩国 AI 生态的多项合作。这是区域市场扩张公告，未提及新 region endpoint、模型在韩国的新可用性或定价。
items.backend_focus: 关注后续是否在 ap-northeast-2 或新 Seoul region 上架 Anthropic API endpoint；目前无 SDK 改动。
